descriptions.zh-CN: 修改自 网盘有效性检查。兼容性较好，兼容包括新版via浏览器和X浏览器3.8.5。隐藏了自动识别并检查链接状态功能，只自动填写密码并跳转，以大幅降低资源占用，避免浏览器卡死。现已支持 ✅百度网盘 ✅蓝奏云 ✅腾讯微云 ✅阿里云盘 ✅天翼云盘 ✅123网盘 ✅迅雷云盘 ✅夸克网盘 ✅奶牛网盘 ✅文叔叔 ✅115网盘 ✅移动彩云
descriptions.zh-TW: 修改自 網盤有效性檢查。兼容性較好，兼容包括新版via瀏覽器和X瀏覽器3.8.5。隱藏了自動識別並檢查鏈接狀態功能，只自動填寫密碼並跳轉，以大幅降低資源佔用，避免瀏覽器卡死。現已支持 ✅百度網盤 ✅藍奏雲 ✅騰訊微雲 ✅阿里雲盤 ✅天翼雲盤 ✅123網盤 ✅迅雷雲盤 ✅夸克網盤 ✅奶牛網盤 ✅文叔叔 ✅115網盤 ✅移動彩雲
descriptions.en: Modified from network disk validity check. It has good compatibility, including the new version of via browser and X browser 3.8.5. The function of automatically identifying and checking the link status is hidden. It only automatically fills in the password and jumps to greatly reduce resource usage and avoid browser freezes. Now supports ✅Baidu Cloud Disk ✅Lanzuo Cloud ✅Tencent Weiyun ✅Alibaba Cloud Disk ✅Tianyi Cloud Disk ✅123 Cloud Disk ✅Thunder Cloud Disk ✅Quark Cloud Disk ✅Cow Cloud Disk ✅Uncle Wen ✅115 Cloud Disk ✅Mobile Caiyun

Through simple operations, users only need to click to instantly translate the web page, saving users time of manually searching words or using online translation tools, and improving work efficiency.
